parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order, use: title, price_in_cents, for descending order use '-' e.g. &sort=-price_in_cents

parameters.name: fields[offers]
parameters.description: Partial attributes as specified, e.g. fields[offers]=title,price_in_cents

parameters.name: filter[title_cont]
parameters.description: Filter by title contains, for example ?filter[title_cont]=course

parameters.name: filter[description_cont]
parameters.description: Filter by description contains, for example ?filter[description_cont]=course

200.description: Success, list of offers which the current user may access
